hero.headline: Certified Translation
hero.body: Accepted by all government authorities and embassies inside and outside the Kingdom. Your documents right the first time.

trust.title: Why Clients Choose Tabador
trust.firstTimeDesc: Your certified translation accepted by authorities without resubmission.
trust.allLanguagesDesc: Over 100 language pairs for any document, any country.
trust.certifiedDesc: Recognized by all Saudi authorities, foreign embassies, and official bodies.
trust.fastDesc: Standard and express service. We respect your deadlines.
trust.locationDesc: Located opposite the Passport Office — right where you need us.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: All certified translation services in one place

personal-official.title: Personal & Official
personal-official.desc: National ID, birth certificates, family records, driving licences.

embassy-schengen.title: Embassy & Schengen
embassy-schengen.desc: Schengen documents, visa files, immigration, all embassy requirements.

academic.title: Academic & Education
academic.desc: Degrees, transcripts, acceptance letters, school certificates.

contracts-business.title: Contracts & Business
contracts-business.desc: Marriage contracts, powers of attorney, employment, company bylaws.

medical.title: Medical Translation
medical.desc: Medical reports, radiology, lab reports, overseas treatment files.

legal-administrative.title: Legal & Administrative
legal-administrative.desc: Official letters, government correspondence, legal documents.

trademark.title: Trademark & SAIP
trademark.desc: Trademark translation and filing with the Saudi IP Authority.

financial-commercial.title: Financial & Commercial
financial-commercial.desc: Bank statements, financial reports, customs and trade documents.

technical-engineering.title: Technical & Engineering
technical-engineering.desc: Manuals, specifications, engineering reports, patent documents.

website-localization.title: Website & App Localization
website-localization.desc: Arabic/English website localization, app translation, marketing content.

interpretation.title: Interpretation
interpretation.desc: Simultaneous and consecutive interpretation for conferences and meetings.

quote.title: Get a Quick Quote
quote.subtitle: Send your document now — we respond within minutes.
quote.uploadHint: PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, DOCX — max 10 MB
quote.name: Your Name
quote.successBody: We will respond to you shortly.
quote.errorBody: Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.

footer.certNote: We certify the translation not the content.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist.

about.title: About Tabador
about.subtitle: 15+ Years of Certified Excellence in Dammam
about.body: Tabador Translation Est. has been the trusted choice for certified translations in Dammam and the Eastern Province for over 15 years. Founded by Mudthar Ahmad, a professional translator, we built our reputation on a simple promise: your documents right the first time.
